features.name: Add proposal template CRUD: GET/POST /api/upwork/templates and 2 MCP tools
Add job save/unsave and saved jobs list endpoints with 2 MCP tools
Add GET /api/upwork/connects endpoint and upwork_get_connects MCP tool
Add watch CRUD: POST/DELETE /api/upwork/monitor/watches with 2 MCP tools
Add GET /api/upwork/messages/unread and upwork_get_unread_messages MCP tool
Add GET /api/upwork/analytics summary endpoint and upwork_get_analytics MCP tool
Add rate-limit/captcha detection and GET /api/upwork/rate-status MCP tool
Add POST /api/upwork/proposals/improve and upwork_improve_proposal MCP tool
